* Five new field operatives who have jumped in to call volunteers, organize block-walking events, coordinate phone banking, distribute lawn signs, and most importantly, knock on hundreds and hundreds of voter doors every week;
* A press specialist to help us obtain local and national media coverage;
* A web development team to revamp our website (coming soon);
* A communications operative to support social media, copywriting, and coordination; and
* Multiple super-volunteers who are helping with digital and graphic design, policy development, and more!

Now we'd like to go one step further. We'd like your input on a comprehensive strategy to win the 2018 Midterm Elections and ensure President Trump can elect more allies of our agenda and fight to Make America Great Again!

**That 's why, as President Trump says, we simply cannot get complacent.**

While the President and I take our America First message on the national stage, we're counting on you to lead the grassroots during this pivotal election year.

Will you lead?

The White House • August 24, 2018
## The Day Ahead
##
President Donald J. Trump and the First Lady will tour Nationwide Children’s Hospital in Columbus, Ohio.
## The smallest victims of the Crisis Next Door
##
**The opioids crisis** touches Americans from all walks of life, responsible for more deaths than either car accidents or gun violence last year. Addiction tears up families everywhere from inner cities along the coasts to rural communities in the heartland. **Some of its victims** are the smallest, most vulnerable among us. From 2000 to 2012, America saw a _five-fold increase_ in the share of babies born with Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome (NAS)—equivalent to one baby suffering from opiate withdrawal born every 25 minutes, according to the National Institute on Drug Abuse. **Last year, 198 babies** were admitted to the neonatal intensive care unit at Nationwide Children’s Hospital in Columbus, Ohio, for NAS. Today, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will tour that facility, discussing the Administration’s [**three-part plan to halt the opioid crisis**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI0Ljk0MDQ4ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNC45NDA0ODg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc2Mzc0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-initiative-stop-opioid-abuse-reduce-drug-supply-demand/). **The First Lady’s “Be Best” initiative** also takes aim at NAS, educating parents on the importance of healthy pregnancies. Last year, the First Lady visited Lily’s Place in West Virginia, where addiction recovery treatment is available to entire families. [**See how President Trump is mobilizing our government to end the opioid crisis.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI0Ljk0MDQ4ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNC45NDA0ODg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc2Mzc0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/opioids/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **More** : **[Get the latest on First Lady Melania Trump’s “Be Best” initiative.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI0Ljk0MDQ4ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNC45NDA0ODg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc2Mzc0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/bebest/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **
# An update on Hurricane Lane
#
**FEMA is working alongside multiple partners** to actively support Hawaii’s efforts as they respond to the potentially devastating impacts of Hurricane Lane. **Hurricane Lane is a Category 3 storm** and continues to move westward across the Central Pacific with maximum sustained winds of 120 mph, according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Hurricane watches and warnings have been issued for parts of Hawaii.
**President Trump urges all Hawaiians** to follow the direction of state and local officials, including evacuation orders when given. Local residents are encouraged to visit [**Ready.gov/hawaii**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI0Ljk0MDQ4ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNC45NDA0ODg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc2Mzc0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.ready.gov/hawaii) or the [**Hawaii Emergency Management Agency**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI0Ljk0MDQ4ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNC45NDA0ODg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc2Mzc0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&http://dod.hawaii.gov/hiema/) for more information. **[Read the President’s Emergency Declaration for Hawaii.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI0Ljk0MDQ4ODYxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyNC45NDA0ODg2MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc2Mzc0JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-approves-hawaii-emergency-declaration/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **
# ‘I was an astronaut. We need a Space Force.’
**“For more than 50 years,** this storied center has been at the forefront of America’s journey to the stars,” Vice President Mike Pence told NASA employees yesterday in a visit to Johnson Space Center in Houston, Texas. “Here, from the Mission Control Center, you have guided every American-crewed space expedition since 1965.” **“The United States Space Force** , we believe, is an idea whose time has come,” the Vice President said. Terry Virts, a retired U.S. Air Force Colonel who served as Commander of the International Space Station, agrees. “It’s hard to overstate the importance of space in our military operations and civilian life,” Virts writes in _The Washington Post_ this week. **“China and Russia** have made it clear they are not willing to accept the status quo.” [**“I was an astronaut. clean_body: | | The White House • August 24, 2018 The Day Ahead President Donald J. Trump and the First Lady will tour Nationwide Children’s Hospital in Columbus, Ohio. The smallest victims of the Crisis Next Door The opioids crisis touches Americans from all walks of life, responsible for more deaths than either car accidents or gun violence last year. Addiction tears up families everywhere from inner cities along the coasts to rural communities in the heartland. Some of its victims are the smallest, most vulnerable among us. From 2000 to 2012, America saw a five-fold increase in the share of babies born with Neonatal Abstinence Syndrome (NAS)—equivalent to one baby suffering from opiate withdrawal born every 25 minutes, according to the National Institute on Drug Abuse. Last year, 198 babies were admitted to the neonatal intensive care unit at Nationwide Children’s Hospital in Columbus, Ohio, for NAS. Today, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will tour that facility, discussing the Administration’s . The First Lady’s “Be Best” initiative also takes aim at NAS, educating parents on the importance of healthy pregnancies. Last year, the First Lady visited Lily’s Place in West Virginia, where addiction recovery treatment is available to entire families. More : An update on Hurricane Lane FEMA is working alongside multiple partners to actively support Hawaii’s efforts as they respond to the potentially devastating impacts of Hurricane Lane. Hurricane Lane is a Category 3 storm and continues to move westward across the Central Pacific with maximum sustained winds of 120 mph, according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Hurricane watches and warnings have been issued for parts of Hawaii. President Trump urges all Hawaiians to follow the direction of state and local officials, including evacuation orders when given. body:
I hope you can take a minute to watch our campaign's newest television ad -- because, while I'm admittedly biased, I promise that it's something special.
| | Peter, I hope you can take a minute to watch our campaign's [**newest television ad**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) \-- because, while I'm admittedly biased, I promise that it's something special. This ad is about Abby's sincere commitment to service in all its forms. For years, in law enforcement and at the CIA, she went to work every day with one goal in mind: **do good, for our country, for our community, and for all the people in it.** As her husband, there are many, many things I admire about Abby -- her intelligence, her poise, her sense of humor -- but something that really stands out at a moment like this one is her heart. She cares about doing good for all of us, and with [**this ad,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) we'll introduce her values and her background to voters across our district. [**Peter, please take a minute to watch the video --_and then consider making a donation to our campaign, because we can only share it with voters with your support._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, Adam \-----forwarded message----- From: Abigail Spanberger Sent: Wed, Aug 22, 8:24 PM Subject: watch our new ad, "Commitment" Friends, I'm writing to share something special with you -- our [**second television advertisement**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) of the general election, which will begin playing across the 7th district today. This ad is about my career in law enforcement, before I started as an officer at CIA, and the oath I took to uphold the Constitution and protect Americans from harm. [_**Please, I hope you 'll take a moment to watch the spot, "Commitment" \-- and then make a donation to our campaign, so we can share it with every voter:**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **The story in this ad is the story of this campaign, friends.** Like you'll hear me say in the video, I'm running for Congress because I believe we need more people in Washington who are committed to service. Too few of our elected leaders are willing to work together to make progress for families in this country, and that must change. But in law enforcement, when I took on drug cases and fought child exploitation, my colleagues and I worked together. We had no choice: **American lives were on the line, and the people we served came first.** With [**your support,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) our campaign will spread this positive message to each and every undecided voter so that we can win come November. **Your generosity has made it possible for us to begin communicating with voters early,[and after you watch the new ad, I would appreciate your help today to sustain our efforts.](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)** Thank you, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Q-lL8TRU1iWTaLuo4Xb55znkXVdvSef0XUuhFoSEunU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/g5xcSL-aWq0K6q1h44XHE_VeXboeDhE8VWojzLRIv-8=?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/fFji-XxyTxdFcZn7jxC-icqWt6X1sCkzBBiG936xGvg=/Z8vmIV38vgFGyAQKE24gZux-BQV7ZEa8E3DTRnWx31M=)_

name: Ben Jealous
subject: I stutter. But I don't stop.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
All kids deserve a chance to thrive.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cbd/4077335978/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/2066807770008984/") Friend, There's something I don't often talk about -- but is pretty obvious when I do talk. I have a stutter. Earlier this week, I spent some time with educators, experts, and young people to talk about how investments in education can help kids with issues like speech impediments. [**Check out our Facebook Live to see why those who struggle to get their words out have as much to say as anyone else -- and why we should be doing all we can to support them.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cbd/4077335978/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/2066807770008984/") For me, this was one of the big challenges I had to take on early. My hero as a kid was Judge Bob Watts -- a pioneering black civil rights judge in Baltimore. He taught me how to debate, inspired me to work to protect and promote civil rights, and when I was a kid, he would look me right in the eye and say, "What do you want to debate, boy?" He knew it'd tie me up in knots. But it taught me to slow down, speak carefully, and gather my thoughts -- and ultimately, I would beat Judge Watts now and again in our debates. That ultimately gave me the confidence to start speaking in public, all because someone spent the time with me to help me succeed. The simple truth is that all kids thrive -- no matter what -- when they have the resources. I'm committed to providing that to all children in Maryland. If I can do one thing in this race -- just one thing -- it'd be to prove to young kids with stutters that there is no limitation on what they can achieve. I hope I'm proof positive of that. You just have to be willing to step out there and be your best self. [**I hope you'll take a look at our Facebook Live from earlier this week to see why I'm so committed to helping expand opportunities and resources for children with speech impediments, and why this means so much to me.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cbd/4077335978/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/2066807770008984/") Thanks, Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cbc/4077335978/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ08248A")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cbf/4077335978/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cbe/4077335978/VEsA/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cb9/4077335978/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b30b/7ab0e2c4/7fd77e89/349b5cb8/4077335978/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). We only have 74 days left until the critical midterm election, and it's never been more important for our grassroots team to be as strong as possible.

By signing up you'll be part of a team that's in all 87 Minnesota counties. I'm glad I can count on you.

Grace

name: Tina Smith, US Senator from Minnesota
subject: Yesterday (re: Planned Parenthood attacked)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
As the first - and only - sitting Senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood, take it from me: There's so much at stake on November 6th, 2018. ------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

I'm writing today to ask you to make a contribution to support Tim Kaine if you haven't already. Let me tell you why:

[As the first - _and only_ \- sitting Senator to have worked for Planned Parenthood, take it from me: There's so much at stake on November 6th, 2018.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1152/3e0906/6cdbf508/3e36b3aa/1979619224/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-smith-split?refcode=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+As+the+first++and+only++sitting+Senator+&utm_campaign=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND&source=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND")

Yesterday we watched as _another_ attempt was made to defund Planned Parenthood in the Senate. Republicans keep trying, Derek, and they keep getting closer.

And what's more, conservatives believe this is their best chance in a _generation_ to overturn Roe v. Wade. And Derek, they're right. With the Supreme Court hanging in the balance we really have one option: **Create a firewall in the Senate.**

That means holding on to our most critical Senate seats in our most contested states - seats like Tim Kaine's in Virginia. Tim is known for asking the hard questions at hearings and standing up against mean-spirited bills and decisions. His endorsement by the Planned Parenthood Action Fund speaks volumes.

**But like all of us, Tim has to spend his energy on fighting the chaos in Washington, not just campaigning - and now he 's in danger of falling short of his August goal. Will you join me and support Tim Kaine with a donation so that he closes his $63,100 gap?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1152/3e0906/6cdbf508/3e36b3a9/1979619224/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-smith-split?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND&source=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND")

We're going to stay focused in the Senate on representing you and your best interests. But that means we rely on supporters like you to step up and support our campaigns while we're in Washington.

Tim's opponent - former chairman of President Trump's Virginia campaign - has attacked Tim at every turn, and has vowed to be "ruthless" in his bid to defeat Tim. **Tim will need to be able to defend himself - and missing his goal could jeopardize that entirely.**

We need to build this pro-choice Senate firewall and we can't do it without Tim. So I'm doing everything I can to support his campaign for Senate - are you, Derek?

[Donate just $5 to make sure we're doing everything in our power to defend our progress on women's rights, and advancing where we can.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1152/3e0906/6cdbf508/3e36b3ad/1979619224/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-smith-split?refcode=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Donate++if+contributionhpc+or+hpc+just++&utm_campaign=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND&source=20180824_1_FR_TS_Smith-Split-LDND")

_Tina Smith_

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: BREAKING: Randolph County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b2/34a064cc/d7885fd/70ee41a/1071895484/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - This morning, the Randolph County Board of Elections rejected the plan to close 7 of 9 polling locations before November. Make no mistake: You did this. Activists down in South Georgia who organized, collected signatures, and petitioned their elected leaders. Folks who elevated this story to the national level, who were ready to drive people they've never met to polling locations in a county they didn't know before last week. Although we celebrate this victory today, our work continues. Many residents of Randolph County will still have trouble casting a ballot on Election Day. Many more still don't have a reason to get out and try. And unfortunately, Randolph County is but one of many Georgia counties considering plans making it harder to vote. Decisions to close polling locations are not a matter of cost, but a question of priorities. Your right to vote is priceless, and all of us have to keep fighting to protect it. **[We can win the fight to protect every person's right to vote; what happened in Randolph County this morning is proof. Now, we need to win in Georgia's 158 other counties, which will take boots on the ground, our positive message on the air, and plenty of resources. Please chip in $3 today to help #TeamAbrams win this fight in November.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b2/34a064cc/d7885fd/70ee41b/1071895484/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI0MTgtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082418-a-link1")** Efforts to suppress the vote or depress voter turnout should make us outraged and activated, not complacent. The urgency of this moment remains. Our right to vote is only safe when we defend it. **Too much is at stake to let up now. And when more of us stand together - when people like you and me support movements for progress with our time, our treasure, and our talents - we win:** **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/VoterOutreach](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9b2/34a064cc/d7885fd/70ee418/1071895484/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI0MTgtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082418-a-link2")** We fought - and won - for Randolph County. Now, let's win for all of Georgia. Stacey Abrams

body:

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fce/1a8421e1/1a56df827/48d40f9f/904887675/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Friends, Re-election campaigns in swing districts like Arizona's First are always busy, and always very expensive, so they require a lot of planning. By the end of August, we're at a sprint. Then, add in the dynamics unique to this race -- and things get REALLY busy, and REALLY expensive, fast. I'm the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and Republican Super PACs are already spending tens of thousands of dollars in our district, trying to unseat me. I'm fortunate to have such a great team behind me this year, but I'm the far-right's top target, and we can't win this race alone. We depend on this community of grassroots supporters to fight back against the Super PACs and carry out our ambitious plans, which is why I'm writing you today. **Every grassroots contribution makes a difference, but there is a special kind of donation that is an especially huge help to my team. These donations, called recurring contributions, repeat once a month through Election Day.** **[Can you help my team plan ahead -- and keep AZ-01 BLUE this fall -- by making a recurring donation of $10 today?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.24_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Recurring donations help give my team a better sense of how much money we have to spend every month. So, for example, if you make a recurring donation of $20, my finance director Lindsay can budget for $20 coming in the door every month. Could you help Lindsay out with a recurring donation today? **[I'll chip in $10 a month >>](http://action.tomohalleran. | | | | Don't miss Martin's update on what he's doing to advance clean energy! We still need around 2,000 signers to show support for his clean energy vision.

[**Sign on to show your support, and read more on Martin 's work below:**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b756/43d8135f/67f1aa58/51002732/3207022620/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Sign+on+to+show+your+support+and+read+mo&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2")

**Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:**

This week, I announced my clean energy vision that will move New Mexico's clean energy economy forward.

[**Learn more about my plan below, and show your support for my plan so we can make it a reality ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b756/43d8135f/67f1aa58/51002735/3207022620/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Learn+more+about+my+plan+below+and+show+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2")

* * *
Solar and wind energy jobs are two of the fastest growing careers in the country. It's clear clean energy is our future, and that is why I announced my clean energy vision for New Mexico so we can be a leader in this expanding sector.

If we're going to modernize our energy infrastructure and our economy, we have to tackle this from every angle. That means:

* Investing in wind and solar energy to create more jobs and build more capacity
* Helping small businesses, local governments, and communities access clean energy
* Repealing President Trump's solar tariffs that slow development and economic progress
* Developing infrastructure to export clean energy to other states and regions

[**We need to dream big if we are going to revolutionize our economy and our energy infrastructure. That 's why I need you with me.**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b756/43d8135f/67f1aa58/51002734/3207022620/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+dream+big+if+we+are+going+to+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2")
**[SUPPORT MARTIN'S VISION](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b756/43d8135f/67f1aa58/51002737/3207022620/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+SUPPORT+MARTINrsquoS+VISION&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2")** I wanted my newest campaign ad to focus on my clean energy vision so I can share my work to move New Mexico's energy economy forward. Now is not the time for half-hearted measures or even outright denials about the importance of clean energy.

[**I am working to gather support for my clean energy vision, but I need you with me. We need 10,000 supporters to step up and show they support my plan -- will you add your name today and show you support clean energy? Sign on here ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b756/43d8135f/67f1aa58/51002736/3207022620/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://heinrich.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/clean-energy-vision?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+I+am+working+to+gather+support+for+my+cl&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180824_1_2")

\-- Martin

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: The needs of the many versus the wants of the few
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
It is our duty to demand social, racial, and economic justice for all.
#
Friends,
Now more than ever we need a movement of people demanding that their leaders set a new standard for American politics.
Since their creation two years ago today, Our Revolution has been that movement. They have grown to hundreds of thousands of people from all backgrounds, coming together to revitalize American democracy through organizing. With over 600 local groups across the country, they are mobilizing the collective power of local groups, and bringing ideas like Medicare for All and tuition-free higher education, ideas that were once considered fringe or radical, into the mainstream.
**Make a monthly recurring contribution now to help build a movement that will fight to ensure that in a modern, moral, and wealthy society like ours, every person has access to basic human rights.**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a946/bed43eb/7a0b3e30/75fc9f10/2877084426/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/secondbirthday?refcode=em180824&recurring=true")**
Working-class Americans deserve a fair stake in our economy, which means all of us must support people and policies that put people over profits. Only leaders who advance bold progressive policies that speak to the concerns of every person, not just the wealthy elite, have the capacity to build a future that we can be proud of.
A future where Medicare for All ensures that wealthy corporations can no longer profit from suffering. A future where our neighbors earn a living wage that is fair and allows them to support their families. A future where every young American can pursue their dream with tuition-free higher education.
These are not fanciful or unaffordable ideals. They are our moral obligations and integral components of building an economy that works for all of us. But to win these battles, and pass these policies, we need progressive champions in every level of government all across this country.
**Contribute today to help support Our Revolution's efforts to build a movement nationwide that will stand up for the interests of working-class Americans of all backgrounds.**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a946/bed43eb/7a0b3e30/75fc9f10/2877084426/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/secondbirthday?refcode=em180824&recurring=true")**
Together, we can support leaders who will represent our progressive values and remain accountable to everyday people **and** combat the system of corporate influence in our political system that obscure the needs of the many in service of a few powerful and wealthy elites.
It is our duty to demand social, racial, and economic justice for all. And with your support, I know that our movement will prevail.
Pa'lante,
Alexandria

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: Virginia Victory - Voter Protection
subject: Help protect the right to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

The Democratic Party of Virginia is looking for attorneys, law students, and legal professionals to join our Voter Protection Team! **You can play a critical role in ensuring that every eligible voter is able to vote on Election Day.**

[Click here to volunteer -- it takes just a minute and makes a big difference.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f115d/3e0906/6c267161/3e36b2d6/3613336456/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/Protect-the-Vote?source=20180824_2_PET_VoPro_Lawyer-Recruitment&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+volunteer++it+takes+just+a&utm_campaign=20180824_2_PET_VoPro_Lawyer-Recruitment")

We need hundreds of volunteers to serve as poll observers inside and outside of polling places across Virginia.

Virginia residents are particularly critical volunteers, as you can be inside polling places on Election Day.

Poll observers help break down barriers to voting by making sure all laws and rules are applied fairly and letting us know about issues at the polls. **There will be training sessions in October to provide all volunteers with the information they need to protect the vote. Please sign up and share the link the below:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Protect-the-Vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f115d/3e0906/6c267161/3e36b2d5/3613336456/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/Protect-the-Vote?source=20180824_2_PET_VoPro_Lawyer-Recruitment&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimkainecomProtecttheVote&utm_campaign=20180824_2_PET_VoPro_Lawyer-Recruitment")

If you have any questions or would like additional information, please contact us at **ProtectTheVote@virginiavictory.org.**

Thank you for your help and support.

_The Virginia Voter Protection Team_

subject: the issues that matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
I wanted to make sure you heard about the state of things on the ground in Arizona. |
---
|

| Hi team -

With just four days until the primary election, I wanted to make sure you heard about the state of things on the ground in Arizona.

This week, Republican primary candidates are campaigning with fringe conspiracy theorists and launching nasty attack ads. Seriously - you can't turn on the TV without seeing one of their negative ads.

For my part, I'm staying focused on the issues that matter to everyday families - issues like protecting Arizonans' health care, standing up for seniors, and taking care of our vets.

[**Friend, I 'm giving it my all for Arizona families, but I need help from supporters like you to fight back against my opponents' partisan attacks. Can you chip in $10 or more now to my campaign so I can keep fighting for everyday people in the U.S. Senate? >>**](http://act.kyrstensinema. I've volunteered with Team Sinema at a local food bank to give back to a community that's given me so much.

I'm grateful for the opportunity to serve the people of Arizona's 9th Congressional District, and I'm so excited about the opportunity to do even more good for our state in the U.S. Senate.

I need your help today to stay focused on the issues that matter. body:
Friend,

Being a United States senator requires talking with constituents - **it 's literally part of the job.**

But even with New Jerseyans and local journalists pressing Bob Hugin to answer simple questions, he continues to refuse.

What is Mr. Hugin afraid of?

[**The people of New Jersey deserve to know where Bob Hugin stands on the issues that affect them. Take our poll today, and help us decide the number one question Bob Hugin should answer.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbd/3af3c5d/3a5f7c60/4ec3ff58/1589734382/VEsH/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/got-a-question-for-bob-hugin-?gpsid=5_73_3129&source=em18_180824_Q4Hug_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180824_Q4Hug_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+The+people+of+New+Jersey+deserve+to+know") **[Take our Poll](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbd/3af3c5d/3a5f7c60/4ec3ff5b/1589734382/VEsE/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/got-a-question-for-bob-hugin-?gpsid=5_73_3129&source=em18_180824_Q4Hug_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180824_Q4Hug_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Take+our+Poll")**
* Do you support Trump's rollback of fuel emission standards, which would cause 1,400 premature deaths each year?
* What is your favorite part of the Trump Republican tax scheme - the stock buybacks or the extra CEO salary raises?
* Why did you discriminate against the woman trying to join your Princeton University club, accuse her of "politically correct fascism," and fight a 13-year lawsuit against her?
* Why did you spike the price of Revlimid three times in one year?

These are only a few of the many simple questions that Bob Hugin should be asked to answer. The people of New Jersey deserve to know - but Hugin remains silent.

[**Take our poll today and tell us the number one question you want Bob Hugin to answer.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cbd/3af3c5d/3a5f7c60/4ec3ff5a/1589734382/VEsF/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/got-a-question-for-bob-hugin-?gpsid=5_73_3129&source=em18_180824_Q4Hug_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180824_Q4Hug_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Take+our+poll+today+and+tell+us+the+numb")

Thank you,

Team Menendez

**Friends, The Washington Post said that my likelihood of losing just went up, **which is why my friend Senator Catherine Cortez Masto said I could reach out.

And let me be very clear: **If we lose in North Dakota, we'll lose our ONLY opportunity to take back the Senate for Democrats. **

That's why a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC is spending $2.3 million to DEFEAT me and strengthen the GOP's grip on the Senate. **Now, NBC and CBS are calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the entire country.**

We must raise $50,000 before our end-of-month deadline. **If we fall short here, we'll lose our only chance to take back the Senate for Democrats. **

**Friends, I wouldn't ask if this weren't important:[Will you rush $5 or more right now to help win in North Dakota and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e55f4/688a0c21/5093b029/73af0a1f/1078078292/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGhoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTEyLWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4hh?refcode=jtk1912-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

And right now, a RealClearPolitics analysis shows me losing by less than 1 point to my opponent, Rep. Kevin Cramer. **With time running out, we're falling short of our must-hit goal. I'm counting on your immediate contribution:**

Heidi
